channel.title: Federico Ramacciotti

item.title: PROJECTS
item.description: Water Reminder This is the first program I made. It’s written entirely in Go and available for Linux and macOS. With this project I learned how to create and package a program, use libraries, and a new language. It is a top bar app that reminds you to drink every 15/30/45/60 minutes through notifications. Simple Tasks I made this program just for Linux (my daily driver) because I needed it during the Covid pandemic when we all had to so several meeting/lessons online.

item.title: SKILLS
item.description: Programming Languages C (learned in University) Java (learned in University) Go (self-taught) SQL (learned in University) Languages Italian English
